title: CAU Imphal Notification 2026 - Walk-in-Interview for Project Associate I Posts
description: Central Agricultural University (CAU) has declared the official notification for the recruitment of various Project Associate I Jobs. Candidates with post-graduation can use this chance and apply for the CAU Imphal Notification 2026 . Here, we included more details about the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts. If you are looking for more, here is a list of Government Jobs in 2026 that you can all apply for. Use ...
